# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html
#
# Crawler access controls (Story 3.8, updated Story 7.4)
#
# Rules:
# - Allow all public pages (products, content, about, homepage)
# - Block auth routes (login, signup, verify — no indexing value)
# - Block checkout/cart routes (transactional, user-specific)
# - Block account routes (private user data, noindex)
# - Block order routes (transactional confirmations, noindex)
# - Sitemap points to static file (generated by scripts/generate-sitemap.ts)

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /auth/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /cart/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /order/

Sitemap: https://www.maisonemile.com/sitemap.xml
